codeReview.summary: Commit ff6cb932be410fa06d975091385838e9f4ed40cb is scoped to the four expected catalog test fixtures and only replaces each class's test PASSWORD constant with the neutral placeholder `ChangeMe123!`. In all four files, user seeding and login payload construction still reference the same shared PASSWORD constant, so the seeded authentication flow remains aligned and there are no production-code, API, or contract changes in the reviewed diff.

summary: Pass. The reviewed feature only changes the four specified catalog test fixtures, preserves seeded login behavior by keeping `ensureUser(...)` and login payloads on the same PASSWORD constant, and introduces no blocking or non-blocking issues.
